name: Happier
description: Happier is a self-hostable UI/CLI stack for monitoring and interacting with Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini sessions from a web UI and mobile.

notes.text: The Happier web UI requires HTTPS for remote access (secure context). Use Tailscale Serve or your reverse proxy.
By default, this script installs Happier via official installers (recommended). For from-source installs, set HAPPIER_PVE_INSTALL_METHOD=from_source (uses npx @happier-dev/stack).

Optional: choose release channel by setting HAPPIER_PVE_HSTACK_CHANNEL=stable|preview (preview uses happier.dev preview installers and npm dist-tag @next). Advanced: set HAPPIER_PVE_HSTACK_PACKAGE='@happier-dev/stack@<tag-or-version>' for from-source installs.
